entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop being studied for yield estimation and management strategies.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, used as a primary metric for estimation and comparison.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of leaf area per unit ground surface area, predicted by the DSSAT model.

entities.name: DSSAT
entities.description: Decision Support System for Agro Technology Transfer, a crop simulation model used to predict rice yields and LAI.

entities.name: CROP MODELS
entities.description: General simulation tools used for yield estimation and evaluating management strategies.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methodologies used for estimating crop yields.

entities.name: EMPIRICAL EQUATIONS
entities.description: Mathematical formulas used for estimating crop yields.

entities.name: CROP-CUTTING EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Field-based method used to obtain observed yield data for model validation.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Farm practices and management methods aimed at improving crop yield and resource efficiency.

entities.name: KARIMNAGAR DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Telangana state where the study was conducted.

entities.name: TELANGANA STATE
entities.description: The state in India where the study region is located.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Biological factors that can cause discrepancies between predicted and actual crop yields.

entities.name: SOWING TIME
entities.description: The timing of sowing which influences the performance of the DSSAT model and crop yield.

entities.name: NITROGEN APPLICATION
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen applied which influences the performance of the DSSAT model and crop yield.

entities.name: CROP YIELD ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of predicting crop yields for decision-making and insurance purposes.
